---
title: "Data Wrangling Final Project"
author: "Murilo"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# 1. Taking a look into the data.

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(janitor) #data cleaning
library(dplyr) #data wrangling
library(tidyverse) #dara wrangling
library(readr) #read excel file
library(lubridate) #work witg date and time in R
```

# 2. Wrangling: Meta data.

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

meta_train <- read.csv("../2026dsa_finalproject_group2/data/training_meta.csv")

meta_train
```
